legal_notice.title: Creative Priority Seal
content: This form seals your creative work at the moment you submit it.
**This is not a copyright registration.** Copyright exists the moment you create something.
This seal gives you something copyright alone does not: cryptographic proof that this exact work
existed, in this exact form, on this exact date — verifiable by anyone, requiring no institution.
You do not need to attach the full work. Seal a precise description, a title, a representative excerpt,
or a SHA-256 hash of the file. What matters is that the seal binds to something specific and unique.

fields.label: Your Name or Artist Name
fields.description: The name you want attached to this priority record.

fields.label: Work Title
fields.description: The title of the work being sealed.

fields.label: Medium / Format
fields.description: What kind of creative work is this?
fields.placeholder: Music / Novel / Screenplay / Visual art / Design / Software / Poem / Other

fields.label: Date of Creation or Completion
fields.description: When was this work created or completed? Format: YYYY-MM-DD

fields.label: Work Description
fields.description: Describe the work precisely. Include distinctive elements that uniquely identify it.
fields.placeholder: Describe the work with enough specificity to distinguish it from any other work.

fields.label: Excerpt or File Hash (Optional)
fields.description: Paste a short excerpt, key passage, or SHA-256 hash of the file. Binds the seal to specific content.
fields.placeholder: Excerpt, key passage, or SHA-256 hash of the file.

fields.label: Publication Status
fields.description: Is this work published, unpublished, or in progress?
fields.placeholder: Unpublished / Published [date] / In progress / Submitted for review

fields.label: Supporting Files (Optional)
fields.description: Upload a preview, excerpt, or representative file. Do not upload the full work if unpublished.

fields.label: Declaration
options: I affirm that I am the creator of this work or an authorized representative of the creator.
I affirm that the description accurately represents the work as it exists at the time of sealing.
I understand this submission is immutable — it cannot be altered after sealing.
I understand the protocol provides a tamper-evident timestamp of priority — not legal copyright registration.

steps: Sealing — Sealed with a FROZEN-2.0 triple-time cryptographic stamp. Permanent.
Ledger entry — Enters the Sovereign Trace ledger with your name, timestamp, and SHA-256 hash.
Notification — You receive your ledger entry ID and SHA-256 hash. Keep it. It is your proof.
after_submit.footer:
The seal is permanent. The seal is the priority record.

Sovereign Trace Protocol | Sheldon K. Salmon | aionsystem2026@gmail.com
